title: Global Contagion Risk Matrix

risks.title: AI Bubble → US Stocks → Global Stocks
risks.trigger: NVIDIA drops >20% in a single day
risks.impact: Nasdaq, Japan/Korea/Taiwan semiconductors, A-share AI concepts

risks.title: China Real Estate → Commodities → Resource Countries
China Local Debt → Banks → Credit Crunch
China Exports → Supply Chain → Inflation
risks.impact: Southeast Asia manufacturing, US/EU inflation expectations

risks.title: US-China Rate Spread → EM Capital Outflow
risks.impact: ASEAN, LatAm currencies and stock markets

footnote: US-China rate spread = US 10Y Treasury yield - China 10Y Treasury yield; Copper/Oil ratio = LME Copper / WTI crude price; EM currency index is inversely derived from EEM drawdown pressure.
